seoTitle: How to Download the Airtable Desktop App Easily
metaDescription: Download and install the official Airtable desktop app for Mac or Windows, then log in and keep it updated for the best performance.
intro: The Airtable desktop app gives you a dedicated window for your bases instead of relying on a browser tab, and installing it is a quick process through the official website. This guide covers finding the download, choosing the right version for your operating system, and logging in after installation.

steps.heading: Go to the official Airtable website
steps.body: Open your web browser and navigate to Airtable's official site.

steps.heading: Find the desktop app download section
steps.body: Locate the desktop applications directory, typically linked in the site's footer menu.

steps.heading: Choose your operating system version
steps.body: Select the appropriate installer for Mac or Windows based on your computer's architecture.

steps.heading: Download and run the installer
steps.body: Download the setup file and run it to install the app locally on your machine.

steps.heading: Launch and log in
steps.body: Open the newly installed desktop app and log in with your existing Airtable account credentials.

steps.heading: Keep the app updated
steps.body: Check periodically for updates to ensure you're running the latest version with the best performance and newest features.

faq.question: Is the Airtable desktop app free?
faq.answer: Yes, the desktop app itself is free to download and use with any existing Airtable account, including the free plan.

faq.question: Does the desktop app work offline?
faq.answer: The desktop app still requires an internet connection to sync your data, similar to the web version.

faq.question: Is the desktop app available for both Mac and Windows?
faq.answer: Yes, Airtable provides installers for both Mac and Windows operating systems.

faq.question: Do I need a separate account for the desktop app?
faq.answer: No, you log in with the same account credentials you use for the web version of Airtable.
